creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm unsure on how to should fix this correctly. Recently we gained include/byteswap.h via commit 1761b09bf42d2842e82c1ac614c23d31c4d4c0dc (see https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-March/003357.html) which also got backported to stable/13 and is included in 13.2-RELEASE.

In https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/Templates/config.site#n119 we hardcode it as not available which seems to break at least dns/dnsjit.
Reference: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/2023-July/452527.html

If I override our config.site ( CONFIGURE_ENV= ac_cv_header_byteswap_h=yes ) it compiles so perhaps we need to do some kind of split config until 12 is deprecated?
The code itself looks alright to me, https://github.com/DNS-OARC/dnsjit/blob/v1.2.3/src/input/fpcap.c

Best regards,
Daniel
